name: Squarespace
description: Squarespace — All-in-one website builder with e-commerce, blogging, templates, and custom domain hosting.

seo.title: Squarespace — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Squarespace: Squarespace — All-in-one website builder with e-commerce, blogging, templates, and custom domain hosting.

when_to_use: Portfolio website with e-commerce built without a developer
Service business website with booking and scheduling tools
E-commerce store with inventory and order management built-in
Headless CMS option connected to a custom frontend via API
Brand website with built-in analytics and marketing tools

cons: Locked editor — no real code escape hatch
E-commerce fees on lower tiers sting
review.verdict: Still the default for creators and small brands who want a good-looking site without touching code.
review.best_for: Photographers, consultants, and small brands who want polished design with zero maintenance
review.not_for: Developers or teams needing deep customization and serious e-commerce scale
